channel.title: Articles on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Hello World: Our First Article
item.description:
Welcome to our news site — this is a sample article created to show how the theme looks with real content.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam.
